name: upublish
description: Publish static sites to upubli.sh instantly. One directory becomes a live URL at username.upubli.sh/slug/.

interface.shortDescription: Publish static sites to the web instantly
interface.longDescription: Publish and manage static sites on upubli.sh with guided workflows and bundled MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Publish this static site with upublish.
List and manage my upublish sites.
